message:
refactor(codegen): Consolidate duplicate helpers (DRY Phase 2)

Eliminate 11 identical uncertainty check functions by adding isExprUncertain()
to NativeCodegen, and consolidate 3 duplicate emitObjExpr functions.

Changes:
- Add isExprUncertain() to main/core.zig (central uncertainty check)
- Add emitObjExpr() to expressions.zig (central block expression wrapper)
- Remove isStringUncertain from string.zig, validation.zig, formatting.zig
- Remove isFloatUncertain from float.zig
- Remove isSetUncertain from set.zig
- Remove isDictUncertain from dict.zig
- Remove isListUncertain from list.zig
- Remove isFileUncertain from file.zig
- Remove isExprUncertain from math.zig, io.zig
- Remove isIterableUncertain from collections.zig
- Remove emitObjExpr from list.zig, dict.zig, set.zig

Lines saved: ~150+ lines of duplicated code
